title: pkg/rootless: simplify reexec for container code
body:
The code currently tried to avoid joining the userns from conmon directly and rather joined to only read the pid file and then send this back to use so we could join the userns. From the comment this was done because we could not read the pid file. However this is no longer true as of commit 49eb5af301 and file is no always owned by the real user.

This means we can just remove this special logic and join the namespace directly there. A test has been added to check the rejoin logic with a custom uidmapping.

comments.body:
@giuseppe PTAL

I am seeing a weird flake
```
podman run --cgroups=disabled --cgroupns=host --rm quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123 cat /proc/self/cgroup
level=error msg="invalid internal status, try resetting the pause process with \"/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman system migrate\": cannot read \"/run/containers/storage/overlay-containers/ff09de79252dfa141b10052ab324660e0f0099c06e7a63d2c2f2b699dcb2ab06/userdata/conmon.pid\": EOF"
```
https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4669127560790016/html/sys-podman-fedora-40-root-host-sqlite.log.html

The error was part of the here removed code so I hope it fixes something. But even if it does not fix the flake this seems simpler now and we can remove a bunch of (almost never used) code.
looks good, but I assume we can also keep my change here as the code is no longer needed?

> looks good, but I assume we can also keep my change here as the code is no longer needed?

yes of course, I think the snippet above can be applied on top of yours
I think the actual regression is from 900e29549afaaec32dbb807a30352632eeb0bd52
code LGTM; @giuseppe you have final say I think.
